scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); let m = 'public/build/manifest.json'; if (!fs.existsSync(m) && fs.existsSync('public/build/.vite/manifest.json')) m = 'public/build/.vite/manifest.json'; if (fs.existsSync(m)) { fs.copyFileSync(m, 'storage/manifest.json'); console.log('Manifest copied to storage'); }"
